plugins.name: dsk
plugins.description: Design System Kernel: turns a company's declared design system source into a stable snapshot — structured data plus rendered screenshots — that the agent reads to generate on-brand slide decks via chat in any folder-and-file based AI Design Tool. The snapshot is captured once and reused; layouts, examples, and content types stay consistent across sessions and users. MVP supports PowerPoint; engines for Keynote, Google Slides, Figma, and design tokens are pluggable.
